title: Hody’s Hatred Survives
description: On pages 16–19, this part focuses on Royal Guards, Unknown person #1, Fukaboshi, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5. The core beat is hody’s hatred survives.
scene: The scene follows hody’s hatred survives, keeping the focus on Royal Guards, Unknown person #1, Fukaboshi, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5.

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Your majesty, please allow us to...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... *Pant* ... so no matter who... is responsible for this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please do not feel any anger on my behalf...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would never wish for you to be consumed by anger and hatred on my account...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If anything were to happen to send Shira- hoshi...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...into an even great- er state of shock than she expe- rienced that day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AKKAMAMBO!! It'll be okay! Everything's all right when you mambo-dance! Ooh yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Ahhhh, what fun!! Such fun! Nothing is wrong! Let us sing, Shirahoshii!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The three of us are always with you-sola-til-do!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...your high- nesses!! What on earth are you ...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare - they start singing and dancing at a time like this?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Watch, Mother!! Everything will be all right!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Stop this at once!! Can you not see the condition that her majesty is ...

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: I swear that I will collect the signatures once more!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We three brothers will become great warriors, just like our father ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: And as we promised you, we will protect Shirahoshii with our lives!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know you can reach... the light of the Sun...!!!

summary: Hody’s Hatred Survives. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
